title: 'Exquisite' fossil of one of the smallest dinosaurs found in Argentina
description: Researchers have found a well-preserved and nearly complete skeleton of one of the world's smallest-known dinosaurs, named Alnashetri cerropoliciensis.

title: Legal challenge failure over Invergordon housing ‘risks other ancient woodland’
description: Worried residents who lost a legal fight against plans for housing in Invergordon fear their defeat could put Scotland’s ancient woodland at risk.

title: Turmeric for Skin: Ancient Remedy, Modern Glow
